# Watts — AI Context & Discovery (llms.txt)

> **Project Name**: Watts (Solary Data)
> **Stack**: Vite, React, TypeScript, Supabase (Postgres), Edge Functions
> **Primary Goal**: Solar monitoring automation & executive report generation.

## 🧠 Project Core Logic

- **Solar Calculations**: `src/utils/solarHelpers.ts` (Calculates ROI, Payback, Economy).
- **OCR Parser**: `src/hooks/useBillUpload.ts` (Regex-based PDF extraction for Equatorial Pará).
- **API Sync**: `src/hooks/useSolarSync.ts` (Orchestrates APsystems data via Edge Functions).
- **Executive Reports**: `src/components/ExecutiveReport.tsx` (Logic for generating PDF output).

## 📂 Key File Mapping

- `src/App.tsx`: Main application shell and router.
- `src/hooks/useEnrichedClients.ts`: Core data merging (Clients + Systems + Bills).
- `src/components/DashboardView.tsx`: Main operational dashboard.
- `supabase/functions/aps-proxy-deep-sync/index.ts`: Edge function for APsystems API proxy.
- `src/index.css`: Global styles and Design System tokens (VDS).

## 🚀 Architectural Principles

- **Veselty Design System (VDS)**: Flat-first, minimal shadows, high-density data.
- **API Quota Management**: 1,000 requests/month hard-cap for APsystems (LV0).
- **Marco Zero**: Manual override support for historical baseline in ROI calculations.
- **GD2 Rules**: Consistent handling of "Parte Energética Líquida" and distribution charges.

## 🛠️ Development Tools
- Task tracking: `C:\Users\flavi\.gemini\antigravity\brain\8f258d87-0440-4aae-9216-8dea334bfeed\task.md`
- Deployment: Supabase CLI
- Build: `npm run build`
